description: Legal fragment written and signed by ʿImmanuel b. Yeḥiel (active ca. 1231–79). Deed of sale with provisions about the right to buy back a house on(?) a mill on Darb Ḥudayjī (or Ḥadījī). The Arabic-script deed of sale (כתאב ביע ערבי) and a document called כתאב אצלהא were given to the buyer, who will bear expenses (maghārim) for the house as well as repairs. Parties are Avraham and Seʿadya. (Information from Goitein's index card.) There are faded jottings on verso in both Hebrew script and Arabic script, it seems accounts.
description_he: שבר משפטי חתום על ידי עמנואל ב. יחיאל (פעיל כ-1231–1279 לספירה). שטר מכר עם הוראות בנוגע לזכות פדיון בית על(?) טחנה בדרב חדיג'י. הצדדים: אברהם וסעדיה
